Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
John Wiley, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Town Taxi, Inc.
Alezander Volchegursky, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: G&M Transportaion, Inc.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Town Taxi's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (AGEE Inc.) is Granted.
The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to provide supplemental responses and produce documents, with the exception of any state and federal tax returns, within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
